MODULE: cosmos.integration.bankr.config
FILE: cosmos/integration/bankr/config.py (103 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Bankr Configuration Module.

Handles API keys, spending limits, and chain preferences.

CLASSES:
- BankrConfig: Configuration for Bankr integration.
  Methods: def from_env(cls) -> 'BankrConfig'
  Methods: def validate(self) -> List[str]
  Methods: def is_valid(self) -> bool

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_bankr_config() -> BankrConfig
- def set_bankr_config(config: BankrConfig)
